tests.test_body:
define i1 @and_icmp_ne_and_pow2_commute(i32 %x) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @and_icmp_ne_and_pow2_commute(
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TMP1:%.*]] = add i32 [[X:%.*]], -160
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[RET:%.*]] = icmp ult i32 [[TMP1]], -33

  %icmp1 = icmp ne i32 %and, 128

  %ret = and i1 %icmp1, %icmp2
  ret i1 %ret
}

issue.title: Missed fold: `x == c || (c + 1 <= x && x <= c2)` => `(c <= x && x <= c2)`
issue.body:
# C++ example

```c++
#include <stdint.h>

using u32 = uint32_t;

auto inline in_range(auto x, auto lo, auto hi) -> bool {
    return lo <= x && x <= hi;
}

extern "C" {
auto src(u32 c) -> bool { return (c == 0x7f) || in_range(c, 0x80, 0x9f); }
auto tgt(u32 c) -> bool { return in_range(c, 0x7f, 0x9f); }
}
```

gives
```asm
src:
        mov     w8, #128
        cmp     w0, #127
        and     w9, w0, #0xffffffe0
        ccmp    w9, w8, #4, ne
        cset    w0, eq
        ret

tgt:
        sub     w8, w0, #127
        cmp     w8, #33
        cset    w0, lo
        ret
```

# Alive proof
```llvm
define dso_local noundef i1 @src(i32 noundef %0) local_unnamed_addr #0 {
  %2 = icmp eq i32 %0, 127
  %3 = and i32 %0, -32
  %4 = icmp eq i32 %3, 128
  %5 = or i1 %2, %4
  ret i1 %5
}

define dso_local noundef i1 @tgt(i32 noundef %0) local_unnamed_addr #0 {
  %2 = add i32 %0, -127
  %3 = icmp ult i32 %2, 33
  ret i1 %3
}
```

# Motivation
[Codegen for `char::is_control` in Rust's stdlib](https://github.com/rust-lang/rust/pull/145219#issuecomment-3172934695)
issue.author: Kmeakin

comments.author: dtcxzyw
comments.body:
>   %3 = and i32 %0, -32
  %4 = icmp eq i32 %3, 128

We can handle this pattern in `foldAndOrOfICmpsUsingRanges`.
